scripts.build: APP_ENV=live npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.dev: APP_ENV=emulator npm run build && npm-run-all --parallel emulators watch:backend watch:frontend
scripts.deploy-all: APP_ENV=live npm run build && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy-live: APP_ENV=live npm run build -w frontend && firebase deploy --only hosting
scripts.deploy-staging: APP_ENV=staging npm run build -w frontend && firebase deploy
scripts.deploy-test: APP_ENV=test npm run build -w frontend && firebase hosting:channel:deploy test
